action.reasoning: Observation: Current best is 0.7719 balanced_accuracy. Few-shot accuracy (0.6174) is the main bottleneck. The CLIP model achieved ~0.7380 val_acc. Analysis: With ~1h remaining, I should try: 1) Ensemble of ConvNeXt + CLIP models in predict.py (no training needed), 2) Continue training ConvNeXt with more stage2 epochs. The ensemble approach is low-risk and could improve few-shot accuracy since CLIP has better generalization for rare classes. Decision: Create ensemble predict.py using both checkpoints, then also run more training to improve the ConvNeXt model.
